summary: 9 Critical Production Issues testing complete. Backend: 100% pass rate (13/13 tests). Frontend: All landing page content verified. All 9 issues addressed: (1) Explore page shows media with thumbnails, (2) Guest mode works for first-time users (no login required), (3) Pricing page accessible, (4) Forgot Password correctly returns success:false when email delivery fails, (5) Start Creating accessible without login, (6) Continue a Story section present on landing page, (7) Navigation descriptions updated with distinct copy, (8) Legal section has distinct descriptions, (9) Misleading labels removed from landing page.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page hero badge shows 'Every story here is unfinished' - VERIFIED
Landing page hero heading shows 'Stories that don't end until you continue them' - VERIFIED
Landing page hero subtitle shows 'Create, watch, and shape stories powered by AI' - VERIFIED
Landing page CTA buttons show 'See What Happens Next' and 'Create Your Version' - VERIFIED
Misleading labels removed: 'No login required', 'Free to start', 'Ready in 30s' are NOT present - VERIFIED
Footer has 4 columns: Create, Discover, Company, Legal with distinct descriptions - VERIFIED
Footer Legal section: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Cookie Policy have distinct descriptions - VERIFIED
Footer Company section has contact email krajapraveen@visionary-suite.com - VERIFIED
Final CTA shows 'Someone already started this story' + 'Will you finish it?' - VERIFIED
Happening Now feed shows compelling story titles (e.g., 'The Day Everything Went Silent', 'He Finally Opened It Too Late') - VERIFIED
Happening Now shows diverse countries (Thailand, Brazil, Spain, Argentina, Japan, Australia) - VERIFIED
Explore page at /explore loads stories with visible thumbnails (24 visible images) - VERIFIED
Backend POST /api/story-engine/create works WITHOUT auth (guest mode) - returns is_guest:true or 401 'Free trial used' - VERIFIED
Forgot Password returns success:false when email delivery fails (SendGrid key expired) - VERIFIED
Backend /api/ab/hook-analytics returns 4 variants (hook_mystery, hook_emotional, hook_shock, hook_curiosity) - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: 9 Critical Production Issues fully verified. All 18 features tested: (1) Hero badge 'Every story here is unfinished', (2) Hero heading 'Stories that don't end until you continue them', (3) Hero subtitle 'Create, watch, and shape stories powered by AI', (4) CTA buttons 'See What Happens Next' and 'Create Your Version', (5) Misleading labels removed, (6) Footer 4 columns with distinct descriptions, (7) Legal section distinct descriptions, (8) Contact email in footer, (9) Final CTA 'Someone already started this story', (10) Live feed compelling titles, (11) Live feed diverse countries, (12) Explore page thumbnails visible, (13) Guest mode creation works, (14) Guest mode returns is_guest:true, (15) Second guest creation returns 401, (16) Forgot password returns success:false on delivery failure, (17) AB hook analytics returns 4 variants, (18) Trending weekly returns stories. Note: SendGrid API key is expired so forgot password correctly returns success:false. Guest creation IP tracking is working.
